title: Create Craftable
description: Create Modpack with Addons & Custom Recipes
body:
# Create Craftable
This modpack is all about the **Create** mod, offering tons of fun ways to build complex machines and systems. We've added some cool **addons** to enhance the experience and give you even more options.

You’ll also find **new crafting recipes**, allowing you to **create materials like zinc and copper** in unique ways. These new recipes make crafting more exciting and give you even more tools to expand your creations.

In addition to that, we've included **custom items** to further spice up the gameplay. Whether you're playing **singleplayer or multiplayer**, this modpack has something for everyone. Plus, you can expect **regular updates** to keep things fresh and exciting!

Jump in and explore the possibilities in this fun and creative modpack :D
